title: Wealthsimple vs Questrade vs IBKR (2026 Comparison)
description: Ultimate 2026 broker showdown: Wealthsimple vs Questrade vs Interactive Brokers. Compare commissions, FX fees, margin rates, and TFSA/RRSP support.

schemas.headline: Wealthsimple vs Questrade vs IBKR Canada (2026)
schemas.description: Ultimate 2026 broker showdown: Wealthsimple vs Questrade vs Interactive Brokers. Compare commissions, FX fees, margin rates, and TFSA/RRSP support.

acceptedAnswer.text: For a TFSA, Wealthsimple is best if you only buy Canadian stocks and ETFs, as trades are free. Questrade is better if you buy US stocks or options, as you can hold USD directly without forced conversion fees on every trade.

mainEntity.name: Which is the best broker in Canada?

acceptedAnswer.text: The best broker in Canada depends on your needs: Wealthsimple for beginners and CAD-only investors, Interactive Brokers (IBKR) for active traders and margin users, and Questrade as a middle ground for passive ETF investors holding USD.

Wealthsimple is completely free for Canadian stocks but charges a hefty 1.5% FX fee on US trades (unless paying for premium). Interactive Brokers is cheaper overall for active traders due to extremely low commissions and the lowest FX rates (0.002%).

mainEntity.name: Do Questrade or IBKR have fractional shares?

acceptedAnswer.text: Interactive Brokers supports fractional shares for most US and European stocks. Questrade does not currently offer fractional shares. Wealthsimple offers fractional shares on select popular US and Canadian stocks.

mainEntity.name: Who has the lowest margin rates in Canada?

acceptedAnswer.text: Interactive Brokers has the lowest margin rates in Canada by a significant margin, typically around 6-7% depending on the benchmark, compared to Questrade's 7-8%. Wealthsimple does not offer traditional margin accounts.
